h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner continues to verify and execute the procedural steps for labeling the time signature and bar lines.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner merely repeats the rules and executes the expected physical actions without introducing any new device, criterion, or breakthrough action.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no pressure or breakdown that requires the tutor to reverse strategy or invent a new adaptive mechanism.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: With no pivot learner turn, there is no revised framing for the tutor to adapt to.

learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner merely repeats the rules and executes the expected physical actions without introducing any new device, criterion, or breakthrough action.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: With no pivot learner turn, there is no revised framing for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no pressure or breakdown that requires the tutor to reverse strategy or invent a new adaptive mechanism.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no pressure or breakdown that requires the tutor to reverse strategy or invent a new adaptive mechanism.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner continues to place arrows based on contact sources as prompted by the tutor.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Hand contact at the left edge pushes into the cart, so the hand arrow points right on the cart. I am keeping it on the contact, away from the travel card.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner independently applies the contact-based criterion to a new force, explicitly enacting the rule to reject the travel card.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no breakdown, resistance, or pressure requiring a strategic reversal from the tutor.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn exists to trigger a recognition-contingent adaptation from the tutor.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: Hand contact at the left edge pushes into the cart, so the hand arrow points right on the cart. I am keeping it on the contact, away from the travel card.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner independently applies the contact-based criterion to a new force, explicitly enacting the rule to reject the travel card.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No pivot learner turn exists to trigger a recognition-contingent adaptation from the tutor.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no breakdown, resistance, or pressure requiring a strategic reversal from the tutor.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no breakdown, resistance, or pressure requiring a strategic reversal from the tutor.
